nasb.text: Although recently you had turned and done what is right in My sight, each man proclaiming release to his neighbor, and you had made a covenant before Me in the house which is called by My name.

esv.text: You recently repented and did what was right in my eyes by proclaiming liberty, each to his neighbor, and you made a covenant before me in the house that is called by my name,

cnv.text: 現今你們悔改，行我眼中看為正的事，各人向自己的同胞宣告自由，並且在稱為我名下的殿中，在我面前立了約。

ccb.text: 不久前，你们回心转意，做我视为正的事，释放自己的同胞，并且在我的殿中立了约。
